reviews.comment:
Si hay algo que tienen las estaciones del ACA es q están siempre limpias y ordenadas. Usamos el baño e impecable

(Translated by Google)
If there's one thing ACA stations have in common, it's that they're always clean and tidy. We used the restroom and it was spotless.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNLeWNDWDFRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Pesimos Servicio, los baños tanto dama como caballeros total falta de aseo, desinfeccion, falta de isumos como kabon liquido, papel, toallas papel, tampoco alcohol en gel  suciedad gral. No recomiendo es mas seria bueno que YPF tomara control del mal servicio que da muy mal concepto a la firma YPF por que el nombre del consecionario no figura.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. Both men's and women's restrooms are completely unclean, lacking in disinfection, and lacking supplies like liquid soap, paper towels, and hand sanitizer. It's generally dirty. I don't recommend it. It would be better if YPF took control of the poor service, which reflects poorly on YPF, since the dealer's name isn't listed.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNLd2ZxM3lBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buen parador después de largos tramos. Tarifas de combustible acordes. Falta limpieza en los sanitarios.

(Translated by Google)
Good rest stop after long journeys. Fuel prices are reasonable. The restrooms need cleaning.
